_comment: BagIdea Office — community Showcase. Show off ANYTHING you built with or inside the office: a custom office, a project your agents shipped, a plugin in action, art, a video. To submit: open a PR that (1) adds your cover image to web/img/showcase/<slug>.(png|jpg|webp) — keep it ~16:9, store it in the repo (don't hotlink a CDN, it expires), and (2) adds an entry below. We merge it preserving your authorship, so you're credited on the Contributors graph + here. See docs/guide/showcase.md.

items.title: The living office
items.author: bagidea
items.desc: The HD-2D AI office running as a live desktop wallpaper at 2am — agents at their desks, neon glow, real day/night. The project itself.

items.title: One office, 19 minds
items.author: bagidea
items.desc: Each agent wired to a different model provider — Claude, GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, local Ollama — picked per task and budget.
